2026/05/15 17:14:12.391972494 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 17:14:12.391990306 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392000687 if (!missing(bg))

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392154254 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392169262 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392170224 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392199568 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392228032 "default"))
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392245895 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392246716 family <- family$metrics

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392342796 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392440278 }

2026/05/15 17:14:12.391972494 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 17:14:12.391990306 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392000687 if (!missing(bg))

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392154254 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392169262 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392170224 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392199568 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392228032 "default"))
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392245895 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 17:14:12.392246716 family <- family$metrics

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392342796 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/15 17:14:12.392440278 }
